common.error_electron_required: Please run in the Electron desktop environment
common.error_db_connect: Failed to connect to local database. Please run inside the Electron desktop app, not a normal browser!
common.db_error_hint:
Unknown error
Please make sure to completely restart the app to apply the latest database patches!

dashboard.greeting: Good morning. Start the day with a clear workspace.
dashboard.intro: The dashboard displays summaries and provides quick shortcuts into all modules.
dashboard.no_tasks: No tasks for today. Enjoy your day!
dashboard.no_books: No current reading book. Import one now!
dashboard.empty_notebook: Notebook is empty. Write your first word!
dashboard.no_videos: No videos collected. Click to manage.
dashboard.bind_task_hint: Bind today's core task to start focus

tasks.title: Task Manager
tasks.subtitle: GTD planner and automated recurring scheduler daemon.
tasks.board_empty_description: After you create a task, it will appear in the board according to its current status.
tasks.quick_add_placeholder: Add task, enter to submit (use #tag for tags)
tasks.template_study_sub_3: Sync highlights & notes to Notes module
tasks.prompt_delete_rule_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this recurring rule?
tasks.toast_template_imported: Successfully imported a set of tasks from template!
tasks.select_task_tip: Select a task to view details
tasks.details_empty_description: Choose a task on the left, or create a new one to get started.
tasks.calendar_empty_title: No tasks are due in this date range
tasks.calendar_empty_description: Tasks will appear here after you assign them a due date.
tasks.rules_empty_description: Create a rule to generate tasks automatically on your chosen schedule.
tasks.scheduled_log_desc: This view shows saved recurring rules for the current user instead of simulated run records.
tasks.scheduled_log_empty: No recurring rules have been saved yet.

notes.title: Notes
notes.subtitle: Multi-format Markdown writing and PKM database.
notes.prompt_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
notes.no_note_selected: Select or create a note to start
notes.empty_state_description: Choose a note from the sidebar, or create a new note to start writing.
notes.toast_navigating_shelf: Navigating to Shelf - Book ID: {{bookId}} Chapter: {{chapter}}
notes.select_note_tip: Select or create a note to begin
notes.notebook_category_help: Choose an existing category or type a new category name.
notes.toast_notebook_exists: Failed to create/rename notebook, name might exist
notes.prompt_delete_notebook_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the notebook "{{name}}"? Notes will not be deleted, they will be moved to "Uncategorized".
notes.prompt_discard_changes: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
notes.error_reserved_notebook_name: That name is reserved for a system entry. Choose another name.
notes.error_notebook_unavailable: This notebook is no longer available. Refresh and try again.

books.title: Books
books.shelf_name_duplicate: A shelf with this name already exists
books.toast_category_create_failed: Could not create the shelf. Please try again.
books.toast_category_update_failed: Could not update the shelf. Please try again.
books.toast_category_delete_failed: Could not delete the shelf. Please try again.
books.confirm_delete_shelf_desc: Delete the shelf “{{name}}”? Its {{count}} books will not be deleted and will move to “To Organize”.
books.subtitle: E-book reading, highlights, and annotations.
books.delete_book_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the book "{{name}}"? This action is irreversible, and will delete the local file and all associated highlights and annotations.
books.unsupported_reader_desc: The {{format}} format is currently supported via your system's default application.
books.chapter_2: Chapter 2: SQLite Database Design and Optimization
books.chapter_3: Chapter 3: Secure Communication between Main and Renderer
books.chapter_4: Chapter 4: Offline Sync and Bidirectional Linking
books.prompt_add_category: Please enter new book category name:
books.toast_note_updated: Reading notes incrementally synced to Notes module!
books.toast_note_synced: Reading notes synced to Notes module successfully!
books.mock_p1: With Offline-First as a core constraint, all user tasks, notes, and reading states remain fully functional and responsive even with no network connection.
books.mock_p2: Local-First does not mean zero cloud services, but that the user completely owns and controls all data.
books.toast_file_picker_unavailable: File selection is only available in the desktop app
books.empty_shelf: No books in this category. Click "Import Book" to add local EPUB/PDFs.
books.mock_p3: By storing all user assets locally in an SQLite database, the application can boot instantly and remain fully operational without internet.
books.toast_category_deleted: Shelf deleted. Its books moved to “To Organize”.
books.confirm_delete_category_desc: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{name}}"? All books under this category will be automatically moved to "Uncategorized". No books will be deleted.

videos.title: Videos
videos.group_name_duplicate: A sibling group with this name already exists
videos.group_translation_duplicate: A sibling group already uses this {{language}} name
videos.group_create_failed: Could not create the group. Please try again.
videos.group_update_failed: Could not update the group. Please try again.
videos.group_delete_failed: Could not delete the group. Please try again.
videos.confirm_delete_group_body: Delete “{{name}}”? Its {{videoCount}} directly assigned videos will not be deleted and will move to “To Organize”. Its {{childCount}} direct child groups will move up one level.
videos.group_unavailable: This group is no longer available. Refresh and try again.
videos.toast_group_saved_refresh_failed: The group was saved, but the list could not be refreshed: {{error}}
videos.subtitle: Online video collection and offline playback library.
videos.subtitle_mock_1: In this chapter, we will discuss Electron IPC.
videos.subtitle_mock_2: In this chapter, we will discuss Electron IPC.
videos.subtitle_mock_3: In this chapter, we will discuss Electron IPC.
videos.subtitle_mock_4: The main process (ipcMain) and renderer process (ipcRenderer) connect properly.
videos.toast_select_at_least_one: Please select at least one video to download
videos.toast_videos_added_to_list: Added {{count}} videos to the video list
videos.toast_video_added: Video added to background download queue
videos.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this video record?
videos.toast_video_deleted: Are you sure you want to delete this video record?
videos.input_url_placeholder: Paste video URL to parse and download (supports YouTube, Bilibili lists or episodes)
videos.bulk_download_skipped: Skipped {{count}} videos that do not need download
videos.bulk_no_download_needed: All selected videos are already downloaded
videos.bulk_no_downloadable_selected: No selected videos can be downloaded
videos.empty_library_tip: Video list is empty. Enter a URL above to parse and download.
videos.video_engine_ready_hint: Downloads are available after loading; URL parsing remains available.
videos.toast_video_engine_loading: The download plugin is loading. Please try again shortly.
videos.parse_result_title: Parse Result - Please select episodes to download
videos.playlist_title_placeholder: Used as the prefix for each part title
videos.confirm_delete_group: Delete group “{{name}}”? Videos in this group will become uncategorized.
videos.details_readonly_downloading: This video is downloading. Details are read-only for now.
videos.details_readonly_invalid: This video is invalid. You can only view details or delete it.
videos.toast_missing_download_source: This video has no download URL and cannot be added to the download queue.
videos.toast_playback_failed: Unable to open this video file.
videos.empty_details_tip: Select a video to edit group, tags, and diagnostics.

toolbox.title: Toolbox
toolbox.subtitle: Sandboxed internal utilities and external link lists.
toolbox.toast_focus_ended: Focus session ended, please take a break!
toolbox.toast_focus_accumulated: Focus time accumulated into task progress successfully!
toolbox.toast_vault_migrated: {{count}} legacy credentials migrated and the password vault is unlocked
toolbox.confirm_delete_credential: Are you sure you want to delete this credential?
toolbox.toast_password_copied: Password copied to clipboard. It will clear automatically in 30 seconds!
toolbox.converter_offline_hint: Local example rate; this is not real-time data.
toolbox.vault_setup_desc: Set a master password with at least 8 characters. It is never stored, and encrypted records cannot be recovered if it is forgotten.
toolbox.vault_locked_desc: Enter the master password before viewing or managing saved credentials.
toolbox.vault_migration_required_desc: Legacy plaintext or simulated-encryption records were detected. Migration creates a sensitive local backup first, then encrypts old records with the new master password.
toolbox.vault_failed_desc: Vault metadata or encrypted data failed validation. Check backups or recovery before continuing.
toolbox.vault_unsupported_desc: This app cannot open the current vault version. Upgrade the app or use the matching version to continue.
toolbox.vault_error_generic: Vault operation failed. Please try again.
toolbox.vault_error_invalid_password: Incorrect master password. Please try again.
toolbox.vault_error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
toolbox.vault_error_password_mismatch: The two master passwords do not match.
toolbox.vault_empty_tip: No credentials recorded. Create your first one on the right.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage preferences, path migrations, and user profiles.
settings.prompt_add_category: Please enter new book category name:
settings.category_subtitle: Sort, modify, add or remove the categories outline on your bookshelf.
settings.account_switch_desc: You can create different user accounts locally, and the system will dynamically connect to independent user databases to achieve physical file data isolation.
settings.security_desc: Configure this secret key. When you later enable OneDrive / WebDAV cloud sync, the local database will be encrypted with AES before uploading to prevent cloud providers from inspecting your data.
settings.security_toast_key_configured: Local backup encryption key configured successfully
settings.security_migration_desc: Safely migrate your entire `~/LifeOS` directory containing databases, accounts, keys, ebooks, and video files to external drives or third-party sync folders (like iCloud Drive).
settings.backup_desc: Export the current user's tasks, notes, books, default videos, and required configuration as a ZIP package with a verification manifest. Sensitive legacy vault backups are excluded.
settings.backup_external_video_note: External video directories are recorded in manifest.json only and are not copied automatically.
settings.restore_desc: The backup version, paths, sizes, and checksums are validated before restoring into the current user directory. The app must restart after a successful restore.
settings.restore_validated: Backup verified: user {{userId}}, format v{{version}}, {{count}} files, source platform {{platform}}.
settings.restore_confirm: Restore {{count}} files to the current user "{{userId}}"? Current user data will be replaced, while sensitive recovery backups are preserved.
settings.restore_success: Restore complete. Restart the app to load the restored data.
settings.prompt_delete_category: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{name}}"? All books under this category will automatically change to "Uncategorized".
settings.toast_user_registered: New user {{id}} registered successfully and switched
settings.theme_desc: Change LifeOS theme style, takes effect instantly.
settings.security_title: End-to-End Encryption Key for Cloud Backups
settings.security_toast_migrated: Data directory migrated successfully. settings.json has been updated.
settings.security_clear_data_desc: Permanently delete all user databases, accounts, and imported files, but keep global configurations (like theme, language). This action is irreversible.
settings.security_clear_confirm_1: Are you sure you want to clear all app data? This will permanently delete all local accounts, tasks, notes, ebooks, and videos. This action cannot be undone.
settings.security_clear_confirm_2: Warning: All local user data will be permanently deleted! Global configurations (theme, language) will be preserved. Do you really want to proceed?
settings.security_clear_success: App data cleared successfully. System has been reset to its initial state.
settings.confirm_clear_password: Are you sure you want to clear the password protection for this account?
settings.account_switch_desc_secure: You will safely log out of your active workspace session. Database connections will be disconnected and locked.
settings.updates_subtitle: Check for updates, view version history, and download installer packages.
settings.updates_dev_mock_note: This is a simulated update flow in development and will not download or install a real version.
settings.updates_not_available: You are on the latest version.
settings.updates_download_failed: Failed to download update. You can manually download the installer from GitHub Releases.
settings.video_downloader_desc: Configure yt-dlp, ffmpeg, Bilibili authentication cookies, and download quality.
settings.video_download_dir_placeholder: Use the current user's video library folder by default
settings.video_bilibili_note_login: For Bilibili HD, member-only, or restricted videos, sign in with the target account in your browser, then choose “Use browser login cookies” here.
settings.video_bilibili_note_verify: Click “Verify cookie access” first. macOS may ask for browser or keychain access; allow it to let yt-dlp read your login cookies.
settings.video_bilibili_note_412: If downloading fails with HTTP 412, Bilibili usually blocked anonymous access. Refresh your browser login or use cookies.txt.
settings.video_bilibili_note_rights: Member videos can only be downloaded at qualities your current account is allowed to access.

topbar.manage_dir_hint: Please manage local books/video directory in Settings

app.update_available_toast: New version {{version}} is available! Please go to Settings -> Updates to install.
app.create_task_cmd_desc: Press Enter to create this todo directly in DB
app.create_note_cmd_desc: Press Enter to create this note and open editor
app.search_placeholder: Search tasks, notes, books, videos, or type /task, /note command...

auth.subtitle_select: Please select an account to unlock your workspace
auth.guest_no_password: The selected account has no password configured. Unlock directly.
auth.err_fill_all: Please fill in all basic profile fields
auth.err_username_format: Username only allows alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens
auth.err_security_needed: A security question is required when setting a password
auth.err_answer_empty: Please provide an answer to your security question
auth.err_api_missing: API Connection missing. Please run in Electron client.
